laws.title: Screen Reader Compatibility
laws.description: Ensure all components and navigation items are screen reader compatible.
laws.remediation: Use ARIA roles and labels to improve screen reader navigation.

laws.title: Keyboard Navigation
laws.description: Improve site accessibility by ensuring all operations are navigable via keyboard.
laws.remediation: Audit focus management and ensure logical tab order.

laws.title: Alternative Text
laws.description: Ensure all images include alt text for visually impaired users.
laws.remediation: Regularly audit image assets for missing or incorrect alt attributes.

laws.title: Video Captioning
laws.description: All video content should have captions for users with hearing impairments.
laws.remediation: Provide an option to enable captions and encourage content creators to caption videos.

laws.title: Form Accessibility
laws.description: Forms should be fully accessible and usable for all users, including those using assistive technologies.
laws.remediation: Associate labels with respective inputs and ensure error messages are clearly communicated.
